title: Lucid (LCID) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Lucid Group reported Q1 2026 earnings with revenue of $282 million, representing 20% year-over-year growth. The company posted a net loss of approximately $1 billion compared to $366 million in Q1 2025. Gross margin was -110.4% compared to -80.7% in Q4 2025. Liquidity post-capital raise was $4.7 billion. Production reached 5,500 vehicles, up 149% year-over-year, with deliveries of 3,093 vehicles, flat year-over-year. The company reported inventory of $1.47 billion with $200 million impairments. The Uber partnership expanded to a minimum of 35,000 robotaxis with Uber investment increased to $500 million. Capital raise of $1.05 billion was completed. Sachin Kansal from Uber was nominated to Lucid Board. Management suspended prior guidance pending incoming CEO Silvio Napoli's strategic review. A temporary Gravity stop sale in February caused delivery delays and inventory buildup, though order intake rebounded 144% in March.
